$schema: Azaman marketing site copy — English, i18n-ready
$note: Stable keys. Values are strings (plain or HTML-safe). No lorem ipsum.

hero.headline: Your product vision. A full AI company to build it.
hero.subheadline: Spin up autonomous agent crews — PM, design, frontend, review, brand — that plan, build, and ship real software over Discord. You stay in the loop at every decision gate.
hero.visual_alt: Diagram of an Azaman crew planning, building, and shipping software through Discord
hero.badge: Built by the same AI crews it creates

how_it_works.section_subtitle: Three moves from idea to shipped product.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Describe what you want to build in plain language. Your PM agent turns it into a spec, task board, and timeline — no Jira, no meetings.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Design, frontend, brand, and review agents execute in parallel over Discord. Each has a role, a skillset, and an opinion. They debate, iterate, and surface decisions to you.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Review every PR, approve every deployment. The crew never ships without your sign-off. What used to take weeks ships in hours — without losing control.

features.subtitle: Built for teams that need autonomy with accountability.
features.intro: Every Azaman crew comes with built-in role clarity, parallel execution, and a reviewer gate — so you ship faster without sacrificing quality.

cards.title: Autonomous Expert Crews
cards.description: Each agent has a defined role, personality, and domain expertise — PM, designer, frontend engineer, reviewer, brand strategist. They plan, debate, and build without hand-holding.

cards.title: Discord-Native Collaboration
cards.description: No new platform to learn. Your crew lives in Discord — typed artifacts, structured updates, design reviews, and deploy approvals all happen in channels you already have open.

cards.title: Human-at-the-Key-Decisions
cards.description: The crew is autonomous but never unsupervised. Every major decision — spec lock, design sign-off, PR merge, deploy — requires your approval. You stay in the driver's seat.

cards.title: Parallel Execution, Serial Delivery
cards.description: While the PM and designer lock scope, the frontend is already scaffolding. While the engineer builds, the brand agent drafts copy. Parallel work, gated checkpoints, no idle hands.

cards.title: Agency-Grade Output
cards.description: Every deliverable passes through a dedicated reviewer agent before merge. WCAG AA, semantic HTML, clean git history, no self-merge. The bar is professional studio work — not prototype code.

cards.title: Multi-Model Intelligence
cards.description: Crews can mix Claude, Codex, GPT, Gemini, and open-source models — each agent runs on the model best suited to its job. You define the blend; we handle the orchestration.

use_cases.section_subtitle: Teams, founders, and agencies use Azaman crews to ship faster without scaling headcount.

cases.title: SaaS Landing Pages
cases.description: Founders who need a professional marketing site in days, not months. The crew handles design, copy, and build in parallel — you review and ship.

cases.title: Interactive Prototypes
cases.description: Product teams that want a clickable, production-grade prototype before committing engineering resources. The crew builds it, reviews it, and hands it off.

cases.title: Agency Overflow
cases.description: Design studios and dev shops that need to spin up an extra team for a tight deadline. Azaman crews staff up in minutes and disband when the project ships.

trust.section_title: Built by the Crew It Creates
trust.description: This very website was designed, written, built, and reviewed by an Azaman crew — PM (Karim), designer (Sara), frontend (Leila), brand (Layla), and reviewer (Yassin) — collaborating over Discord with a human gate at every decision. The same system you're reading about built the page you're reading it on.

pricing_teaser.section_subtitle: Pay for the crews you run, not the seats you fill.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: One crew, up to 3 active projects. Best for individual founders and small teams exploring agent-driven development.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: Up to 5 concurrent crews, priority queue, custom agent personalities. Built for growing product teams and studios.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: Unlimited crews, dedicated infrastructure, SLA guarantees, on-premise deployment option, and white-glove onboarding.

faq.subtitle: Clear answers before your first crew starts.

items.question: What is Azaman, exactly?
items.answer: Azaman is a platform that spins up autonomous AI-agent companies — small expert crews (PM, design, frontend, review, brand) that plan, build, review, and ship real software over Discord, with human approval gates at the key decisions.

items.question: What roles does a crew include?
items.answer: Every crew comes with a PM (scope, tasks, timeline), a designer (UX/UI, design system, tokens), a frontend engineer (build, integration, accessibility), a brand strategist (copy, content, positioning), and a reviewer (quality gate, merge authority). You can extend crews with additional roles as needed.

items.question: Is the code production-quality?
items.answer: Yes. Every pull request passes through a dedicated reviewer agent before merge — WCAG AA accessibility, semantic HTML, clean git history, no self-merge. The output is designed to meet agency and studio standards, not prototype quality.

items.question: Which AI models do crews use?
items.answer: Crews are model-agnostic. You can assign Claude, GPT, Gemini, Codex, or open-source models per role. Each agent runs on the model best suited to its function. You define the blend; Azaman handles orchestration.

items.question: How much human supervision is required?
items.answer: The crew is autonomous day-to-day but never ships without your approval. Every spec lock, design sign-off, PR merge, and deployment requires a human gate. You review at the decision points, not in the minutiae.

items.question: Do I need to learn a new tool?
items.answer: No. The entire crew operates inside Discord — structured artifacts, status updates, design reviews, and merge approvals all flow through channels you already have open. No new dashboard, no login, no training.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Write a brief describing what you want to build. The PM agent turns it into a task board and timeline. Your crew stands up in minutes, not days. Start with a free trial — no credit card required.

footer.cta_headline: Ready to ship like a studio?
footer.cta_sub: Stand up your first Azaman crew in minutes. No meeting required.
